commits: 14a46121955b0e848bdb6a7f8e5ece6cebb049db: docs(0.7.0): Pack 1 design memo — schema, writer, kind->source_type
findings_addressed: D1 — sibling column on vector_default (vs sibling table); cites binary-quant guide mixed-flavour declaration, confirmed via WebFetch 2026-05-27.

D2 — Pack 1 column inventory: embedding (float), embedding_bin (bit), source_type (partition_key), kind, created_at. 11 metadata slots + 3 partition-key slots headroom. tags/project_mentions deferred (no writer source today).
D3 — kind->source_type total mapping table; admit 'doc' as 7th source_type value (test/synthetic fixture); unknown kinds error rather than silently default.

D4 — vec0 has no ALTER ADD COLUMN; migration is CREATE staging vec0 + INSERT...SELECT vec_quantize_binary + DROP + RENAME inside one writer transaction. NOT NULL enforced at the writer (vec0 has no declarative NOT NULL on metadata cols). Schema-version stamp lives in operational_mutations for idempotence.
D5 — vec_quantize_binary runs SQL-side as part of the single INSERT in commit_projection_outcomes (lib.rs:2845-2853); avoids extra Rust dep + extra bind allocation.

D6 — Round-trip RED-test fixture specified: dim=768, v[0..384]=+1.0, v[384..768]=-1.0, expected popcount=384; second L2-normalised case proves sign-invariance. Empirical contract validation deferred to P1-IMPL's RED test by design.
D7 — Confirmed second writer site at Engine::write_vector_for_test (lib.rs:1806-1845, insert at :1838); Pack 1 must update both sites in lockstep.

D8 — Reader at read_search_in_tx (lib.rs:2317-2323) is provably no-op under schema extension: embedding column type unchanged; metadata blog confirms additional vec0 columns do not alter MATCH semantics on the original vector column. AC-013 latency stays at 2048/2327 ms post-Pack 1.
next_step_for_orchestrator: spawn codex reviewer on the Pack 1 design memo
